mapper.insert: insert into t_content_count (id, content_id, like_total, collect_total, comment_total) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{likeTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collectTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{commentTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into t_content_count
id,
content_id,
like_total,
collect_total,
comment_total,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{likeTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{collectTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{commentTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},

insert into t_content_count (content_id, like_total) values (#{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{likeTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT}) on duplicate key update like_total = like_total + (#{likeTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into t_content_count (content_id, collect_total) values (#{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collectTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT}) on duplicate key update collect_total = collect_total + (#{collectTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT})
insert into t_content_count (content_id, comment_total) values (#{contentId}, #{count}) on duplicate key update comment_total = comment_total + (#{count})
mapper.update:
update t_content_count
content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
like_total = #{likeTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
collect_total = #{collectTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment_total = #{commentTotal,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
